nasb.text: Haran died in the presence of his father Terah in the land of his birth, in Ur of the Chaldeans.

esv.text: Haran died in the presence of his father Terah in the land of his kindred, in Ur of the Chaldeans.

cnv.text: 哈蘭在他父親他拉之前，死在他出生之地，就是迦勒底的吾珥。

ccb.text: 哈兰比他父亲他拉先去世，他死在自己的家乡——迦勒底的吾珥。

csbs.text: 哈兰在他父亲塔勒之前，死在他本族之地，就是迦勒底的吾珥。
